misc.text: The devil's in the detail.. 🧐 #OnePiece مـيـكـايـلـو (@mekailo_001) #حرق_ون_بيس || #ONEPIECE فيه عدة غوامض ف القصة ننتظر معرفتها ومن البديهي ذكر بعضها لذلك بتجنب البديهيات فبذكر احد الغوامض الأخرى اللي ودي اعرفه وهو مش ف الواجهة الأولى عندنا كمتابعين ايش سالفة هالسيفين؟؟ ومين الجحوش اللي كانوا مستلّينها؟؟؟؟؟؟؟؟ (طبعًا اللي ف إلباف اضخم بأضعااااااااااااف) — https://nitter.net/mekailo_001/status/2007554948666667302#m

misc.title: Rereading the Skypiea arc, you realize that Enel modeled himself on the true gods. He had his own Serpent (similar to the Earth god)and attached this ring-shaped form to himself to be considered a tru
misc.text: Rereading the Skypiea arc, you realize that Enel modeled himself on the true gods. He had his own Serpent (similar to the Earth god)and attached this ring-shaped form to himself to be considered a true god (like Imu has a flying ring behind him). The details are so interesting.

misc.title: Man... I keep reread the Skypia arc, Kalgara and Noland flashback is just peak, as a One Piece fan, it's a flashback that you should definitely read.
